raw_consumer_statement: An unauthorized transaction of {$2200.00} was processed from my bank account to my Barclaycard account on XX/XX/XXXX and I called Barclaycard on XX/XX/XXXX. I did not authorize this transaction. I reported this to Barclays on XX/XX/XXXX and was promised a refund in 5 business days. No refund has been provided. I have followed up multiple times and it was escalated again today, but no action has been taken. This is now affecting my ability to pay my mortgage. I need this resolved immediately. Ive filed a claim and complaint with barclays. Claim number is XXXX
